title: Library of Congress Women Suffrage Primary Sources
description: A LOC source card for women suffrage primary sources and classroom materials.
license: Library of Congress / item-level rights vary

pages.text: The Library of Congress women suffrage source set includes historical documents and images about organizing, argument, protest, voting rights, and constitutional change.
Use this source for students comparing arguments, tactics, audiences, and historical context across primary sources.
Library of Congress source sets include public-domain and rights-unknown primary sources. Use the item pages to confirm rights before mirroring individual documents.
